calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-30-2025 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo.

Plaintiff/Respondent Martiza Tronoff appeared, sworn and testified on her own behalf.

Ananya Sreekanth, Esq., and Jessica Santillo, Esq., of Eviction Defense Collaborative appeared for Defendants/Appellants Maria Centeno and Mayra Centeno. Assisted by Court certified Spanish interpreter Shannon Raintree and Monica Hernandez.

Defendants/Appellants Maria Centeno and Mayra Centeno sworn and testified on their own behalf.

The following documentary evidence is introduced and admitted:
Plaintiff/Respondent's Group Exhibit.
Defendant/Appellant's Group Exhibit.

The matter is taken under submission.

All exhibits offered in open court are returned.
Judge: Carol Gold, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
